tasks.title: Create billing_subscription_events Drizzle schema
tasks.description:
Create `packages/db/src/schemas/billing/billing_subscription_event.dbschema.ts` with the audit trail table schema.

Follow the exact Drizzle schema from spec Section 7:
- Table: `billing_subscription_events`
- Columns: id (uuid PK), subscription_id (uuid FK to billingSubscriptions.id ON DELETE CASCADE), previous_status (varchar 50), new_status (varchar 50), trigger_source (varchar 50), provider_event_id (varchar 255 nullable), metadata (jsonb with $type<Record<string, unknown>>() default {}), created_at (timestamptz default now)
- Indexes: idx_subscription_events_subscription_id on subscriptionId, idx_subscription_events_created_at on createdAt
- Import billingSubscriptions from '../../billing/index.ts'
- Use object syntax for indexes: `(table) => ({...})` (NOT array syntax)

Update barrel export in `packages/db/src/schemas/billing/index.ts`:
- Add `export * from './billing_subscription_event.dbschema.ts';`

Generate and apply migration:
- Run `pnpm db:generate` from packages/db
- Run `pnpm db:migrate` from packages/db

Test: Verify the schema compiles with `pnpm typecheck` from packages/db. Verify migration applies cleanly.

subtasks.title: Create billing_subscription_event.dbschema.ts with table definition and indexes
Run pnpm db:generate to create migration SQL
Run pnpm db:migrate to apply migration

From spec Section 8:

- `subscriptionEventsResponseSchema`: z.object with data (array of subscriptionEventSchema), pagination (object with page, pageSize, totalItems, totalPages)
- Export type `SubscriptionEvent = z.infer<typeof subscriptionEventSchema>`

tasks.title: Create status mapping constant and notification helper functions
tasks.description:
Create the status mapping and transition helper functions in `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts` (new file, first part).

From spec Section 6:
- Create `QZPAY_TO_HOSPEDA_STATUS` constant map: Record<string, SubscriptionStatusEnum | null>
  - active -> ACTIVE, paused -> PAUSED, canceled (1L) -> CANCELLED (2L), finished -> EXPIRED, pending -> null
- Create 4 helper functions:
  - `shouldSendReactivationEmail(previousStatus, newStatus)`: returns true when newStatus=ACTIVE and previousStatus is PAUSED, CANCELLED, or PAST_DUE (NOT trialing)
  - `shouldSendPausedEmail(previousStatus, newStatus)`: returns true when newStatus=PAUSED and previousStatus !== PAUSED
  - `shouldSendCancelledEmail(previousStatus, newStatus)`: returns true when newStatus=CANCELLED and previousStatus is not CANCELLED or EXPIRED
  - `shouldSendAdminAlert(previousStatus, newStatus)`: same logic as shouldSendCancelledEmail

Import SubscriptionStatusEnum from @repo/schemas.

Tests: Create `apps/api/test/webhooks/subscription-logic.test.ts` (first part). Test all status mappings:
- 'active' -> ACTIVE, 'paused' -> PAUSED, 'canceled' -> CANCELLED (verify 2L spelling), 'finished' -> EXPIRED, 'pending' -> null
- Unknown status -> undefined (not in map)
- Test all shouldSend* helpers with transition rules from spec Section 6 table (22 test cases)

subtasks.title: Create subscription-logic.ts file with QZPAY_TO_HOSPEDA_STATUS constant
Write unit tests for status mapping (all 6 cases + unknown)

tasks.title: Implement processSubscriptionUpdated business logic
tasks.description:
Add the main `processSubscriptionUpdated()` function to `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts`.

From spec Section 10.1, implement the 10-step flow:
1. Extract mpPreapprovalId via extractMPSubscriptionEventData(event)
2. Fetch subscription from MP API via paymentAdapter.subscriptions.retrieve(mpPreapprovalId)
3. Extract qzpayStatus from mpSubscription.status
4. Map to internal status via QZPAY_TO_HOSPEDA_STATUS. Handle null (pending) and unknown cases
5. Query local subscription via direct Drizzle: SELECT FROM billingSubscriptions WHERE mpSubscriptionId = mpPreapprovalId AND deletedAt IS NULL LIMIT 1
6. Compare statuses - if same, return early {success:true, statusChanged:false}
7. Update billingSubscriptions: status, updatedAt=new Date(), canceledAt (if CANCELLED and not set), cancelAtPeriodEnd=false (if reactivating to ACTIVE)
8. Insert audit log to billingSubscriptionEvents (non-blocking try/catch)
9. Look up customer/plan for notifications (non-blocking), call notification functions based on shouldSend* helpers
10. Return {success:true, statusChanged:true, newStatus}

Interfaces: ProcessSubscriptionUpdatedInput (event, billing, paymentAdapter, providerEventId, source?), ProcessSubscriptionUpdatedResult (success, statusChanged, newStatus?, error?)

All imports per spec Section 10.1 imports block. Notification functions will be wired in T-014.

Tests: Extend `apps/api/test/webhooks/subscription-logic.test.ts`:
- Test cases 1-12 from spec Section 15 (all status transitions, no-ops, unknown status, not found, API failure, audit failure, empty subscriptionId)
- Mock: paymentAdapter.subscriptions.retrieve, extractMPSubscriptionEventData, getDb (chain: select/from/where/limit, update/set/where, insert/values), billing.customers.get, billing.plans.get, Sentry.captureException, apiLogger

subtasks.title: Implement steps 1-4: extract ID, fetch from MP, map status
Implement step 5: query local subscription via Drizzle
Implement step 6: status comparison early return
Implement step 7: update billing_subscriptions with conditional fields
Implement step 8: non-blocking audit log insert
Implement step 9: customer/plan lookup + notification dispatch stubs
Write tests for all 12 core test cases

tasks.title: Rewrite subscription-handler.ts to call processSubscriptionUpdated
tasks.description:
Replace the body of `handleSubscriptionUpdated` in `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-handler.ts`.

From spec Section 10.2:
- Import processSubscriptionUpdated from './subscription-logic'
- Import getWebhookDependencies, markEventProcessedByProviderId from './utils'
- Get deps via getWebhookDependencies(). If null, log warn and mark processed.
- Call processSubscriptionUpdated({ event, billing: deps.billing, paymentAdapter: deps.paymentAdapter, providerEventId: String(event.id), source: 'webhook' })
- If result.success, call markEventProcessedByProviderId
- If !success, let error propagate (event enters dead letter queue)
- Return undefined

Tests: Create `apps/api/test/webhooks/subscription-handler.test.ts`:
- Test: calls processSubscriptionUpdated and marks event processed on success
- Test: propagates error on failure (does not mark processed)
- Test: skips processing when deps is null (billing not configured)
- Mock: processSubscriptionUpdated, getWebhookDependencies, markEventProcessedByProviderId

subtasks.title: Replace handler body with new implementation

tasks.description:

From spec Section 10.3:
1. Split lines 165-174: separate `payment.created` (keep auto-resolve) from `subscription_preapproval.updated` (new logic)
2. Add new imports at top:
   - `import { processSubscriptionUpdated } from '../routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.js';`
   - `import { createMercadoPagoAdapter } from '@repo/billing';`
   - `import type { QZPayWebhookEvent } from '@qazuor/qzpay-core';`
3. Create `retrySubscriptionUpdated(payload, providerEventId)` function:
   - Get billing via getQZPayBilling() (already imported)
   - Create paymentAdapter via createMercadoPagoAdapter()
   - Reconstruct QZPayWebhookEvent from stored payload (only id, type, data, created)
   - Call processSubscriptionUpdated with source='dead-letter-retry'
   - Return result.success

Tests: Modify existing `apps/api/test/cron/webhook-retry.job.test.ts`:
- Test case 14: subscription_preapproval.updated retried with business logic (NOT auto-resolved)
- Test case 15: payment.created still auto-resolves after case split

tasks.title: Add notification helper functions to webhook notifications.ts
tasks.description:
Add 3 new functions to `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/notifications.ts`.

From spec Section 10.4:

**sendSubscriptionCancelledNotification(params):**
- RO-RO pattern with readonly params: customerId, customerEmail, customerName, userId (string|null), planName, currentPeriodEnd?, mpSubscriptionId, previousStatus
- Send user notification (SUBSCRIPTION_CANCELLED) if customerEmail exists
- Send admin alert (ADMIN_SYSTEM_EVENT, severity 'warning') to all ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS with eventDetails: {eventType: 'subscription_involuntary_cancellation', customerEmail, planName, mpSubscriptionId, previousStatus}
- All sendNotification calls wrapped in .catch()

**sendSubscriptionPausedNotification(params):**
- Params: customerId, customerEmail, customerName, userId, planName
- Send SUBSCRIPTION_PAUSED notification, .catch() wrapped

**sendSubscriptionReactivatedNotification(params):**
- Params: customerId, customerEmail, customerName, userId, planName, nextBillingDate?
- Send SUBSCRIPTION_REACTIVATED notification, .catch() wrapped

Imports: sendNotification from '../../../utils/notification-helper', NotificationType from '@repo/notifications', apiLogger from '../../../utils/logger'

Test: Covered by integration tests in T-015.

tasks.title: Wire notification calls into processSubscriptionUpdated
tasks.description:
Update `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts` step 9 to call the real notification functions.

From spec Section 10.1 step 9:
- Import sendSubscriptionCancelledNotification, sendSubscriptionPausedNotification, sendSubscriptionReactivatedNotification from './notifications'
- After status update (step 7) and audit log (step 8):
  - Look up customer via billing.customers.get(localSubscription.customerId) and plan via billing.plans.get(localSubscription.planId) - non-blocking try/catch
  - Extract customerName: metadata.name -> customer.email -> 'Usuario'
  - Extract userId: metadata.userId or null
  - Get periodEndDate from mpSubscription.currentPeriodEnd, only use if > now()
  - Call shouldSendCancelledEmail -> sendSubscriptionCancelledNotification (with .catch)
  - Call shouldSendPausedEmail -> sendSubscriptionPausedNotification (with .catch)
  - Call shouldSendReactivationEmail -> sendSubscriptionReactivatedNotification (with .catch)

Tests: Add test cases 16-22 to subscription-logic.test.ts:
- soft-deleted subscription not found
- canceled + canceledAt already set -> no overwrite
- past_due -> active sends reactivation
- trialing -> active does NOT send reactivation
- expired -> cancelled: no email, no admin alert
- active + cancel_at_period_end=true + active: no-op
- cancelled + cancel_at_period_end=true + active: resets, sends reactivation

tasks.title: Create admin API route for subscription events
tasks.description:
Create `apps/api/src/routes/billing/admin/subscription-events.ts` and mount it.

From spec Section 11.3:
- GET /:id/events with zValidator for param (id: uuid) and query (page: coerce number default 1, pageSize: coerce number max 50 default 10)
- Use createRouter() from ../../../utils/create-app
- Query billingSubscriptionEvents with Drizzle: select where subscriptionId=id, orderBy desc createdAt, limit+offset pagination
- Count query in parallel via Promise.all
- Return c.json({ success: true, data: events (with createdAt.toISOString()), pagination: {page, pageSize, totalItems, totalPages} })
- Error handling: try/catch, return 500 on failure with apiLogger.error
- Export as subscriptionEventsRoute

Mount in `apps/api/src/routes/billing/admin/index.ts`:
- Import subscriptionEventsRoute
- Add `app.route('/subscriptions', subscriptionEventsRoute)` (makes full path /api/v1/admin/billing/subscriptions/:id/events)

No individual permission check needed (admin auth middleware covers it).

Test: Create admin endpoint integration test verifying pagination, empty results, and sort order.

tasks.title: Final quality gate and full integration verification

- `pnpm typecheck` (full monorepo)
